setting: Two friends are talking at a cafe after one of them got ditched by a girl.
lyrics:
[Verse 1]
Nothing's on my back because I wanted it with you
And I want you too... I want you
I'm still at my prime because no one will let it through
I want you to... I want you to

[Verse 2]
You're caught up in the morning rain
As always, you have called me again
I'll be there by seven, but I should've said eleven
Well just to make you teased again

[Verse 3]
I hop out from the quiet bed
I hop on to the private train
Takes forty minutes ride from here to apartment
where I aim to appear

[Pre-Chorus]
I'll be you're umbrella and I'll save you from Cruella everyday
So don't you shut me out of there as soon as all the sky is clear
Because

[Chorus]
Nothing's on my back because I wanted it with you
And I want you too... I want you
You're still at our flat where we kissed in every nook
That makes me so... that makes me so

[Verse 4]
Good old station welcomes me
I used to use it every week
Attendant still remembers me
And gently he says,'Where've you been?

[Verse 5]
I've been round in circles like an overturning turtle
I guess so
I'm trying to overturn again but water in this pools me in

[Chorus]
Nothing's on my map because I wanted it with you
And I want you too... I want you
Lasting dream won't last, I guess this saying's coming true
I bet you so... I bet you so

[Verse 6]
I finally arrive at Hilton suite
It's 6:08 but I rang the bell
I gave her name and suddenly,
The rain has stopped to fall, ahd breezed

[Interlude]
(Way to go way to go way to go
Where to go where to go where to go
Where do you go where do you go)

[Verse 7]
She answers me on entry phone
My duty has been canceled off
She said she's going out with friends
Now, there's nothing that I can say
Because I'm in charge of rainy days

[Outro Chorus]
Nothing's on my back because I wanted it with you
And I want you too... I want you
I'm still at my prime because no one will let it through
I want you to... I want you to
I miss you so... I miss you so...
I kissed you though... I kissed you though...

lyricsJa.en: [Verse 1]
Nothing's on my back because I wanted it with you
lyricsJa.ja: 君と一緒に欲しかったから、僕の背中には何もない

lyricsJa.en: And I want you too... I want you
lyricsJa.ja: そして君も欲しいんだ…君が欲しい

lyricsJa.en: I'm still at my prime because no one will let it through
lyricsJa.ja: 誰にも邪魔させないから、僕はまだ全盛期のままだ

lyricsJa.en: I want you to... I want you to
lyricsJa.ja: 君にもそうあってほしい…君にそうしてほしい

lyricsJa.en: [Verse 2]
You're caught up in the morning rain
lyricsJa.ja: 君は朝の雨に降られている

lyricsJa.en: As always, you have called me again
lyricsJa.ja: いつものように、また僕を呼んだね

lyricsJa.en: I'll be there by seven, but I should've said eleven
lyricsJa.ja: 7時までに行くよ、本当は11時って言うべきだったけど

lyricsJa.en: Well just to make you teased again
lyricsJa.ja: まあ、また君をからかうためにね

lyricsJa.en: [Verse 3]
I hop out from the quiet bed
lyricsJa.ja: 静かなベッドから飛び出して

lyricsJa.en: I hop on to the private train
lyricsJa.ja: 私鉄に飛び乗る

lyricsJa.en: Takes forty minutes ride from here to apartment
lyricsJa.ja: ここからアパートまで電車で40分

lyricsJa.en: where I aim to appear
lyricsJa.ja: 僕が向かおうとしている場所さ

lyricsJa.en: [Pre-Chorus]
I'll be you're umbrella and I'll save you from Cruella everyday
lyricsJa.ja: 僕が君の傘になって、毎日クルエラから守ってあげる

lyricsJa.en: So don't you shut me out of there as soon as all the sky is clear
lyricsJa.ja: だから空が晴れた途端に、僕を締め出したりしないで

lyricsJa.en: Because
lyricsJa.ja: だって

lyricsJa.en: [Chorus]
Nothing's on my back because I wanted it with you
lyricsJa.ja: 君と一緒に欲しかったから、僕の背中には何もない

lyricsJa.en: And I want you too... I want you
lyricsJa.ja: そして君も欲しいんだ…君が欲しい

lyricsJa.en: You're still at our flat where we kissed in every nook
lyricsJa.ja: 隅々までキスしたあの部屋に、君はまだいる

lyricsJa.en: That makes me so... that makes me so
lyricsJa.ja: それが僕をこんなにも…僕をこんなにも

lyricsJa.en: [Verse 4]
Good old station welcomes me
lyricsJa.ja: 懐かしい駅が僕を迎える

lyricsJa.en: I used to use it every week
lyricsJa.ja: 毎週使っていたあの駅

lyricsJa.en: Attendant still remembers me
lyricsJa.ja: 駅員さんはまだ僕を覚えていて

lyricsJa.en: And gently he says,'Where've you been?
lyricsJa.ja: 優しく言うんだ、「どこに行ってたんだい？」

lyricsJa.en: [Verse 5]
I've been round in circles like an overturning turtle
lyricsJa.ja: ひっくり返ったカメみたいに、ずっと同じ場所を回っていたんだ

lyricsJa.en: I guess so
lyricsJa.ja: 多分ね

lyricsJa.en: I'm trying to overturn again but water in this pools me in
lyricsJa.ja: また起き上がろうとしてるけど、ここの水が僕を引き止めるんだ

lyricsJa.en: [Chorus]
Nothing's on my map because I wanted it with you
lyricsJa.ja: 君と一緒に欲しかったから、僕の地図には何もない

lyricsJa.en: And I want you too... I want you
lyricsJa.ja: そして君も欲しいんだ…君が欲しい

lyricsJa.en: Lasting dream won't last, I guess this saying's coming true
lyricsJa.ja: 正夢は続かない、そんな言葉が現実になりそうだ

lyricsJa.en: I bet you so... I bet you so
lyricsJa.ja: きっとそうさ…きっとそうなんだ

lyricsJa.en: [Verse 6]
I finally arrive at Hilton suite
lyricsJa.ja: ついにヒルトンのスイートに着いた

lyricsJa.en: It's 6:08 but I rang the bell
lyricsJa.ja: まだ6時8分だけど、ベルを鳴らした

lyricsJa.en: I gave her name and suddenly,
lyricsJa.ja: 彼女の名前を告げると、突然

lyricsJa.en: The rain has stopped to fall, ahd breezed
lyricsJa.ja: 雨が降り止んで、風が吹いた

lyricsJa.en: [Interlude]
(Way to go way to go way to go
lyricsJa.ja: （いいぞ、その調子だ、その調子だ）

lyricsJa.en: Where to go where to go where to go
lyricsJa.ja: どこへ行けばいい、どこへ行けばいい、どこへ行けばいい

lyricsJa.en: Where do you go where do you go)
lyricsJa.ja: どこへ行くの、どこへ行くの）

lyricsJa.en: [Verse 7]
She answers me on entry phone
lyricsJa.ja: 彼女がインターホン越しに答える

lyricsJa.en: My duty has been canceled off
lyricsJa.ja: 僕の役目はキャンセルされてしまった

lyricsJa.en: She said she's going out with friends
lyricsJa.ja: 友達と出かけるって彼女は言った

lyricsJa.en: Now, there's nothing that I can say
lyricsJa.ja: 今の僕には、言えることなんて何もない

lyricsJa.en: Because I'm in charge of rainy days
lyricsJa.ja: なぜなら僕は雨の日の担当だから

lyricsJa.en: [Outro Chorus]
Nothing's on my back because I wanted it with you
lyricsJa.ja: 君と一緒にいたかったから、僕の背中には何もない

lyricsJa.en: And I want you too... I want you
lyricsJa.ja: そして君が欲しい…君が欲しいんだ

lyricsJa.en: I'm still at my prime because no one will let it through
lyricsJa.ja: 誰も通してくれないから、僕はまだ全盛期のままだ

lyricsJa.en: I want you to... I want you to
lyricsJa.ja: 君に…してほしい…君に…してほしい

lyricsJa.en: I miss you so... I miss you so...
lyricsJa.ja: とても会いたいよ…とても会いたいよ…

lyricsJa.en: I kissed you though... I kissed you though...
lyricsJa.ja: キスしたけれど…キスしたけれど…

conversation.speaker: A

sentences.text: I hop on to the private train, ride for forty minutes, and she cancels on me!
sentences.displayHtml: I hop on to the private train, ride for forty minutes, and she cancels on me!

conversation.japanese: 信じられる？わざわざ私鉄に乗って40分もかけて行ったのに、ドタキャンされたんだよ！

conversation.speaker: B

sentences.text: What exactly happened when you got to her place?
sentences.displayHtml: What exactly happened when you got to her place?

conversation.japanese: 本当に？彼女の家に着いて、一体何があったの？

conversation.speaker: A

sentences.text: I got there, and as soon as I rang the bell, the rain suddenly stopped!
sentences.displayHtml: I got there, and as soon as I rang the bell, the rain suddenly stopped!

conversation.japanese: 着いてインターホンを鳴らした途端に、突然雨がピタッと止んでね。

conversation.speaker: B

sentences.text: Did she even let you inside?
sentences.displayHtml: Did she even let you inside?

conversation.japanese: で、部屋には入れてくれたわけ？

conversation.speaker: A

sentences.text: No, she answers me on entry phone and says she's going out with friends instead.
sentences.displayHtml: No, she answers me on entry phone and says she's going out with friends instead.

conversation.japanese: いや、オートロック越しにインターホンに出て、「友達と出かけるから」って。

conversation.speaker: B

sentences.text: She only calls you when it's raining and she's bored.
sentences.displayHtml: She only calls you when it's raining and she's bored.

conversation.japanese: ひどすぎる。彼女、雨が降ってて退屈な時しか君のこと呼ばないじゃない。

conversation.speaker: A

sentences.text: My duty has been canceled off, just like that.
sentences.displayHtml: My duty has been canceled off, just like that.

sentences.text: I guess I'm in charge of rainy days.
sentences.displayHtml: I guess I'm in charge of rainy days.

conversation.japanese: ああ。僕の任務はお払い箱ってわけさ。どうやら、僕は雨の日の担当でしかないみたいだよ。

conversation.speaker: B

sentences.text: You have to stop letting her use you.
sentences.displayHtml: You have to stop letting her use you.

conversation.japanese: もっといい人がいるよ。もう彼女に都合よく使われるのはやめなよ。

conversation.speaker: A

sentences.text: I've been round in circles with her for too long.
sentences.displayHtml: I've been round in circles with her for too long.

conversation.japanese: 分かってる。もう彼女とは堂々巡りだ。これきりにするよ。
